info.name: CargoPulse API v1
info.description:
Enterprise-level SaaS Logistics Platform API Collection

## Architecture
- Multi-tenant SaaS with Row-Level Isolation
- Event-Driven Workflows with Laravel Horizon
- High-Concurrency GPS via Redis Geospatial
- State Machine for Shipment Lifecycle

## Environment Required
Create environment with variables:
- `base_url`: Your API base URL
- `tenant_admin_email`: Admin email
- `tenant_admin_password`: Admin password
- `merchant_email`: Merchant email
- `merchant_password`: Merchant password
- `driver_email`: Driver email
- `driver_password`: Driver password

## Auto-Extracted Variables
- `tenant_admin_token`: Extracted on admin login
- `merchant_api_token`: Extracted on merchant login
- `driver_mobile_token`: Extracted on driver login
- `current_shipment_id`: Extracted on shipment creation
- `current_route_id`: Extracted on route creation
- `current_tracking_number`: Extracted on shipment creation

item.name: 01. Authentication & Onboarding
item.description: Authentication endpoints for different user types (Admin, Merchant, Driver) with token extraction and RBAC validation.

request.description:
Authenticate as a Tenant Admin (Logistics Company Admin).

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Returns: access_token, token_type, user object with role 'Company Admin'
- Token abilities: ['*'] (Full access)

Authenticate as a Warehouse Manager to test limited permissions.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Token abilities: ['shipments:manage', 'warehouse:manage']
- Cannot access: billing, merchant invoices, route creation

Authenticate as a Driver using mobile app credentials.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Token abilities: ['shipments:update', 'gps:update']
- This token should ONLY work for mobile endpoints

Authenticate as a B2B Merchant for API access.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Token abilities: ['shipments:create', 'shipments:read']
- Returns merchant object instead of user object

**Negative Test:** Attempt login with invalid credentials.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error message: 'The provided credentials do not match our records.'

**Negative Test:** Attempt login without required fields.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Errors for: email (required), password (required)

**Negative Test:** Attempt login with invalid type parameter.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The selected type is invalid'

Retrieve the currently authenticated user details.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Returns full user object with tenant relationship

item.name: 1.9 Get User - No Auth Token (Negative Test)

request.description:
**Negative Test:** Attempt to access protected endpoint without authentication.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 401 Unauthorized

Revoke the current access token.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Message: 'Successfully logged out'
- Token should no longer work for subsequent requests

item.name: 02. Shipment Management
item.description: Shipment creation, state transitions, and lifecycle management using the State Machine pattern.

body.raw:
{
    "merchant_id": {{merchant_id}},
    "tracking_number": "CP-{{$timestamp}}",
    "recipient_name": "John Doe",
    "recipient_phone": "+1234567890",
    "recipient_address": "123 Main Street, City, State 12345",
    "recipient_lat": 40.7128,
    "recipient_lng": -74.0060,
    "cod_amount": 50.00,
    "weight": 2.5,
    "pieces": 1,
    "notes": "Fragile - Handle with care",
    "metadata": {
        "order_id": "ORD-12345",
        "ecommerce_platform": "shopify"
    }
}

request.description:
Create a single shipment via API.

**ShipmentData DTO Expected Fields:**
- merchant_id: required (from authenticated tenant)
- tracking_number: unique identifier
- recipient_name, recipient_phone, recipient_address
- recipient_lat, recipient_lng (for routing)
- cod_amount: Cash on Delivery value
- weight, pieces: Physical attributes
- notes: Special instructions
- metadata: JSONB for flexible data

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 201 Created
- Initial state: 'Pending'
- Returns full shipment object with relations

**Negative Test:** Attempt to create shipment without required fields.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Validation errors for missing required fields

**Negative Test:** Attempt to create shipment with duplicate tracking number.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The tracking number has already been taken'

Create shipment using Merchant API token.

**Expected Behavior:**
- Merchant should only be able to create shipments under their own merchant_id
- merchant_id should be auto-inferred from token (not accepted from request body)

Search shipments with basic pagination.

**AdvancedShipmentSearch Pipeline Supported Filters:**
- state: Filter by shipment state
- merchant_id: Filter by merchant
- tracking_number: Exact or partial match
- date_from: Start date filter
- date_to: End date filter
- sort_by: Field to sort by
- sort_direction: asc/desc
- per_page: Items per page (1-100)

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Paginated response with data, meta, links

Search shipments filtered by state.

**Expected Response:**
- All returned shipments have state = 'Pending'

Search shipments by exact tracking number.

**Expected Response:**
- Returns only the matching shipment

Search shipments within a date range.

**Expected Response:**
- All shipments created within the specified date range

Search shipments with custom sorting.

**Expected Response:**
- Results sorted by created_at in descending order

**Negative Test:** Attempt to search with invalid sort direction.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The selected sort direction is invalid'

item.name: 2.11 Search Shipments - Per Page Exceeds Limit (Negative)

request.description:
**Negative Test:** Attempt to request more than 100 items per page.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The per page may not be greater than 100'

**Negative Test:** Attempt to search with date_to before date_from.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The date to must be a date after or equal to date from'

item.name: 03. Route & Fleet Management
item.description: Route manifest creation, driver assignment, and route operations.

request.description:
Create a route manifest (daily trip) and assign to a driver.

**RouteAssignmentData DTO Expected Fields:**
- driver_id: The driver assigned to this route
- shipment_ids: Array of shipment IDs to include as stops
- scheduled_date: When the route is scheduled
- notes: Optional route notes

**Business Rules:**
- A Route represents a daily manifest assigned to EXACTLY ONE driver
- Shipments must be in 'Packed' or 'Assigned' state to be added

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 201 Created
- Returns route object with driver and shipments relations

**Negative Test:** Attempt to assign same driver to another active route.

**Business Rule:** Route represents a daily manifest assigned to EXACTLY ONE driver.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Validation failure indicating driver already has an active route

Start a route (begin delivery trip).

**StartRouteAction Behavior:**
- Updates route status to 'In Progress'
- May update associated shipment states
- Records start timestamp

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Route status updated to 'In Progress'

Reorder the stops (shipments) on a route.

**ReorderRouteStopsData DTO Expected Fields:**
- stop_ids: Array of shipment IDs
- ordered_sequence: Array of sequence numbers corresponding to stop_ids

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Stops reordered successfully

**Negative Test:** Attempt to create route with non-existent driver.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Error: 'The selected driver id is invalid'

item.name: 04. Warehouse Operations
item.description: Warehouse scanning, check-in, and transfer operations.

request.description:
Check-in a shipment to a warehouse via scanning.

**ScanData DTO Expected Fields:**
- tracking_number: The shipment's tracking number
- warehouse_id: The warehouse checking in the shipment
- scanned_by: Optional operator identifier

**CheckInShipmentAction Behavior:**
- Updates shipment warehouse_id
- Transitions state to appropriate warehouse state
- Records scan timestamp in status logs

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Returns shipment with updated state and warehouse

Transfer a shipment from one warehouse to another.

**TransferShipmentAction Behavior:**
- Updates shipment warehouse_id to new warehouse
- Records transfer in status logs
- May trigger notifications

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Returns shipment with new warehouse_id

**Negative Test:** Attempt to check-in non-existent shipment.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 404 Not Found or 422 Validation Error

**Negative Test:** Attempt check-in without tracking number.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity

item.name: 05. Driver GPS & Telemetry
item.description: High-frequency GPS ingestion via Redis, bypassing PostgreSQL for real-time performance.

request.description:
Submit a single GPS coordinate from driver mobile app.

**DriverLocationData DTO Expected Fields:**
- lat: Latitude (required)
- lng: Longitude (required)
- timestamp: Unix timestamp or ISO date
- accuracy: GPS accuracy in meters (optional)
- speed: Speed in km/h (optional)
- heading: Direction in degrees (optional)

**Architecture (Critical):**
- This endpoint BYPASSES PostgreSQL entirely
- Writes directly to Redis Geospatial Index: `tenant:{id}:drivers:geo`
- Stores metadata in Redis Hash: `tenant:{id}:drivers:data`
- Response should be < 200ms

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 202 Accepted (async processing acknowledged)
- Message: 'Location ingested successfully'

**Negative Test:** Submit invalid GPS coordinates.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity
- Validation error for lat/lng range (-90 to 90, -180 to 180)

**Negative Test:** Submit GPS without required coordinates.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 Unprocessable Entity

**Negative Test:** Submit GPS without authentication.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 401 Unauthorized

item.name: 06. Analytics & Metrics
item.description: Dashboard metrics and KPIs for tenant operations.

request.description:
Retrieve global KPI metrics for the tenant dashboard.

**GetTenantDashboardMetricsAction Returns:**
- Total shipments count
- Shipments by state breakdown
- Active drivers count
- Pending deliveries
- COD collected vs pending
- Delivery success rate
- Average delivery time

**CRITICAL:** Endpoints remain FULLY STRICTLY SCOPED to the active tenant via TenantScope.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Metrics object with operational KPIs

**Negative Test:** Attempt to access metrics without authentication.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 401 Unauthorized

item.name: 07. RBAC & Permission Tests
item.description: Test Role-Based Access Control enforcement across different user types.

request.description:
Test Warehouse Manager accessing analytics (should be allowed if policy permits).

**Warehouse Manager Abilities:** ['shipments:manage', 'warehouse:manage']

**Negative Test:** Driver attempting to access analytics dashboard.

**Driver Abilities:** ['shipments:update', 'gps:update']

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 403 Forbidden
- Drivers should NOT have access to analytics

**Negative Test:** Driver attempting to create a shipment.

**Driver Abilities:** ['shipments:update', 'gps:update']
- No 'shipments:create' ability

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 403 Forbidden

**Negative Test:** Driver attempting to create a route.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 403 Forbidden
- Only admins/managers can create routes

**Negative Test:** Merchant attempting to access tenant analytics.

**Merchant Abilities:** ['shipments:create', 'shipments:read']
- No access to analytics dashboard

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 403 Forbidden

**Negative Test:** Merchant attempting to create a route.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 403 Forbidden

item.name: 08. Multi-Tenancy Isolation Tests
item.description: CRITICAL: Verify that TenantScope enforces strict data isolation between tenants.

item.name: 8.1 Setup - Login as Tenant B User

request.description:
Login as a user from a DIFFERENT tenant to test data isolation.

**Prerequisite:** A second tenant must exist in the system.

item.name: 8.2 Tenant B - Cannot See Tenant A Shipments

request.description:
**CRITICAL TEST:** Verify Tenant B cannot see Tenant A's shipments.

**TenantScope Enforcement:**
- `Shipment::all()` automatically appends `WHERE tenant_id = auth()->user()->tenant_id`
- Tenant B should only see their own shipments

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Results should NOT include Tenant A's shipment (created in test 2.1)

item.name: 8.3 Tenant B - Cannot Access Tenant A Route

request.description:
**CRITICAL TEST:** Verify Tenant B cannot modify Tenant A's routes.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 404 Not Found (Route not found in tenant's scope)
- OR 403 Forbidden

item.name: 8.4 Tenant B - Cannot Access Tenant A Metrics

request.description:
**CRITICAL TEST:** Verify Tenant B metrics only reflect Tenant B's data.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 200 OK
- Metrics should show 0 or only Tenant B's data (not Tenant A's)

item.name: 09. Performance & Concurrency Tests
item.description: Test high-concurrency scenarios and response time requirements.

request.description:
**PERFORMANCE TEST:** Measure GPS ingestion response time.

**NFR Requirement:** API response times < 200ms
**Architecture:** Redis-only write (no PostgreSQL I/O)

**Expected:**
- Response time < 200ms
- Status: 202 Accepted

**PERFORMANCE TEST:** Measure search endpoint response time.

**NFR Requirement:** API response times < 200ms

**PERFORMANCE TEST:** Measure metrics aggregation response time.

**NFR Requirement:** API response times < 200ms

item.name: 10. Error Handling & Edge Cases
item.description: Test error responses, validation, and edge cases.

request.description:
**Edge Case:** Request to non-existent endpoint.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 404 Not Found

**Edge Case:** Using invalid HTTP method on valid endpoint.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 405 Method Not Allowed

**Edge Case:** Send malformed JSON in request body.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 400 Bad Request

**Edge Case:** Use invalid/expired token.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 401 Unauthorized

**Edge Case:** Send JSON body with wrong Content-Type header.

**Expected Response:**
- Status: 422 or 400 (validation fails due to no parsed body)
